id.description:
The dash-separated dept, full-code, and section-code, e.g. `CIS-120-001` for the
001 lecture section of CIS-120.

status.description:
The registration status of the section. Options and meanings:
"O""Open"
"C""Closed"
"X""Cancelled"
"""Unlisted"

activity.description:
The section activity, e.g. `LEC` for CIS-120-001 (2020A). Options and meanings:
"""Undefined"
"CLN""Clinic"
"CRT""Clinical Rotation"
"DAB""Dissertation Abroad"
"DIS""Dissertation"
"DPC""Doctoral Program Exchange"
"FLD""Field Work"
"HYB""Hybrid"
"IND""Independent Study"
"LAB""Lab"
"LEC""Lecture"
"MST""Masters Thesis"
"ONL""Online"
"PRC""Practicum"
"REC""Recitation"
"SEM""Seminar"
"SRT""Senior Thesis"
"STU""Studio"

credits.description: The number of credits this section is worth.

capacity.description: The max allowed enrollment across all crosslistings of this section.

semester.description:
The semester of the course (of the form YYYYx where x is A [for spring],
B [summer], or C [fall]), e.g. `2019C` for fall 2019.

meetings.description:
A list of the meetings of this section (each meeting is a continuous span of time
during which a section would meet).

instructors.description: A list of the names of the instructors teaching this section.

course_quality.description: The average course quality rating for this section, on a scale of 0-4.

instructor_quality.description: The average instructor quality for this section, on a scale of 0-4.

difficulty.description: The average difficult rating for this section, on a scale of 0-4.

work_required.description: The average work required for this section, on a scale of 0-4.

associated_sections.description:
A list of all sections associated with the Course which this section belongs to; e.g. for
CIS-120-001, all of the lecture and recitation sections for CIS-120 (including CIS-120-001)
in the same semester.

registration_volume.description: The number of active PCA registrations watching this section.
